description: CompositionCharcoal grey short sleeved T-shirt for men made of 100% polyester, with graphic print on the chest and nike swoosh printed on the left sleeveFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsAt the gym, on the beach or simply enjoying those healthy runs, there's no better way to do it than in this nike T-shirt. Smart to look at and engineered with Dry-Fit technology to ensure you stay dry and fresh all day, there's nothing better an active man can ask for. The contoured panels add a dash of style to this tee. Pair it with track pants or shorts and sports shoes to complete that uber cool look.
